title: Odeya EstimandContract
description: An immutable prospective mathematical contract for one closed claim type. It fixes exact population, unit, exposure, comparator, outcome, time, intercurrent-event, summary, contrast, scale, uncertainty, multiplicity, missingness, sequential, method, and decision semantics before affected outcome access. It is not a result, claim, or authority grant.

x-odeya-digest-scope.subject: exact retained artifact or profile document bytes
